name: twork/phy-journey-section
title: Journey Section
description: Patient journey vertical timeline section: header + list of steps, matching physiotherapy-rehab.html.

sectionSubtitle.default: A structured approach to getting you back to 100%.

attributes.sectionSubtitle: A structured approach to getting you back to 100%.

attributes.title: 1. Initial Assessment
attributes.description: Comprehensive evaluation of your posture, movement, and pain points by our senior physiotherapists.

attributes.title: 2. Treatment Plan
attributes.description: We design a personalized roadmap combining manual therapy, machines, and exercises.

attributes.title: 3. Active Rehab
attributes.description: Guided sessions in our gym to strengthen muscles and improve flexibility.

attributes.title: 4. Maintenance
attributes.description: Home exercise programs to prevent future injuries and maintain health.
